Shauta Sinha, 3A, Entrenchment Road, Marredpally West, Secunderabad-500 026 as the Chairperson of the said Commission in accordance with Section 4 of the Act. Smt. Shanta Sinha shall hold office for a period of three years from 5th March, 2007 or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 3-5/2006-CW1 LOVELEEN KACKER, A.
